h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues to correctly label force arrows as interactions, following the tutor's direct guidance without deviation.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Earth pulls cart. [moves to the up arrow] Track pushes cart. [caps the pen, slides the finished sheet aside, reaches for the next]
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner completes the labeling task as directed, but this is a straightforward execution of the tutor's instructions rather than a novel performance of a new device or criterion.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No learner pressure or breakdown occurs; the tutor's guidance proceeds smoothly without needing to change route or invent a new mechanism.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is present because no reversal trigger or tutor strategy change occurs.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn exists, so there is no revised learner framing for the tutor to adapt to.

learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner completes the labeling task as directed, but this is a straightforward execution of the tutor's instructions rather than a novel performance of a new device or criterion.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn exists, so there is no revised learner framing for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: No learner pressure or breakdown occurs; the tutor's guidance proceeds smoothly without needing to change route or invent a new mechanism.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: No learner pressure or breakdown occurs; the tutor's guidance proceeds smoothly without needing to change route or invent a new mechanism.
